name: Flux.2 Klein 4B
description: High-quality text-to-image using Flux.2 [Klein] base 4B (diffusion_models/flux-2-klein-base-4b.safetensors) with the Qwen3-4B text encoder and Flux.2 VAE. Uses CFGGuider (cfg 5), euler sampler and the Flux2 scheduler; ~20 steps recommended. Slower but higher fidelity than z_image_turbo. On the V100 (sm_70) it runs in fp16 compute (no fp8 fast path). Params: prompt (required), width, height, steps (20 default), seed.
